title.zh: Cobalt Strike 服务器搭建历程：配置与特征消除
title.en: Cobalt Strike Server Build Walkthrough: Configuration and Feature Elimination

description.zh: 详细介绍 Cobalt Strike C2 服务器的搭建过程，包括使用 profile 配置流量特征、修改默认端口、伪造证书以及重签自有证书等隐匿技术。
description.en: Detailed walkthrough of Cobalt Strike C2 server setup, including using profile to configure traffic features, modifying default ports, forging certificates, and re-signing own certificates for anonymity.

content.zh: 如何搭建 Cobalt Strike C2 服务器？
content.en: How to set up a Cobalt Strike C2 server?

annotation.zh: 用户请求 CS 服务器搭建指导
annotation.en: User requests CS server setup guidance

codeBlocks.code:
#server
nohup ./teamserver <vps_ip> <connect_password> &

#client
java -XX:ParallelGCThreads=4 -XX:+AggressiveHeap -XX:+UseParallelGC -jar cobaltstrike.jar
#杈撳叆<vps_ip> <connect_password>
#鍚嶅瓧浠绘剰濉叆

#server
nohup ./teamserver <vps_ip> <connect_password> your_mode.profile &

#client
java -XX:ParallelGCThreads=4 -XX:+AggressiveHeap -XX:+UseParallelGC -jar cobaltstrike.jar
#杈撳叆<vps_ip> <connect_password>
#鍚嶅瓧浠绘剰濉叆

rm ./cobaltstrike.store
sed -i 's!-alias cobaltstrike -dname "CN=Major Cobalt Strike, OU=AdvancedPenTesting, O=cobaltstrike, L=Somewhere, S=Cyberspace, C=Earth"!-alias common-domain.com -dname "CN=common-domain Windows, OU=MOPR, O=Sentrylab Inc, L=Redmond, ST=HEFEI, C=CN"!g' teamserver

PORT      STATE SERVICE     VERSION
10080/tcp open  ssl/unknown
| ssl-cert: Subject: commonName=common-domain Windows/organizationName=Sentrylab Inc/stateOrProvinceName=HEFEI/countryName=CN
| Issuer: commonName=common-domain Windows/organizationName=Sentrylab Inc/stateOrProvinceName=HEFEI/countryName=CN
| Public Key type: rsa
| Public Key bits: 2048
| Signature Algorithm: sha256WithRSAEncryption
| Not valid before: 2022-02-17T09:06:25
| Not valid after:  2022-05-18T09:06:25
| MD5:   2d0b efaa d942 3336 f561 bb5d 9e0b 9751
|_SHA-1: ee50 0484 7d73 d8c4 fe5d 3ef0 80fe 390c a3ed 5bcc
|_ssl-date: TLS randomness does not represent time

#鐢熸垚p12鏂囦欢
openssl pkcs12 -export -in public.pem -inkey private.key -out domain-test.p12 -name domain-test.com -passout pass:123456
#鐢熸垚store鏂囦欢
keytool -importkeystore -deststorepass 123456 -destkeypass 123456 -destkeystore domain-test.store -srckeystore domain-test.p12 -srcstoretype PKCS12 -srcstorepass 123456 -alias domain-test.com
#鐢熸垚鐨勬枃浠跺悕瀛楀彲浠ラ殢鎰忥紝鍩熷悕闇€瀵瑰簲涓婏紱

content.zh: 基本搭建流程：客户端上传 CS 包到 VPS，服务端解压后启动 teamserver。两种启动方式：1) 无 profile 模式：nohup ./teamserver <vps_ip> <password> &；2) 使用 profile：添加自定义 profile 文件参数，可修改 HTTP/S 流量特征避免被检测。
content.en: Basic setup process: Client uploads CS package to VPS, server extracts and starts teamserver. Two startup methods: 1) No profile mode: nohup ./teamserver <vps_ip> <password> &; 2) Using profile: Add custom profile file parameter to modify HTTP/S traffic features and avoid detection.

content.zh: 如何消除 CS 服务器的特征？
content.en: How to eliminate CS server features?

content.zh: 特征消除三步骤：1) 修改默认端口：编辑 teamserver 文件将 50050 改为其他端口；2) 伪造证书：删除默认 cobaltstrike.store，使用 keytool 重签证书；3) 重签自有证书：从 Cloudflare 获取源服务器证书，转换为 store 格式使用。
content.en: Three steps to eliminate features: 1) Modify default port: Edit teamserver file to change 50050 to another port; 2) Forged certificate: Delete default cobaltstrike.store, use keytool to re-sign certificate; 3) Re-sign own certificate: Obtain origin server certificate from Cloudflare, convert to store format.

content.zh: 证书修改后的效果如何验证？
content.en: How to verify the effect after certificate modification?

content.zh: 使用 nmap 扫描验证：执行 nmap 扫描 10080 端口，检查 ssl-cert 信息。修改后的证书应显示自定义的 CN、O、L、S、C 字段，而非默认的 Cobalt Strike 特征。注意：即使修改证书，网络测绘平台仍可能识别出 CS 特征。
content.en: Use nmap scan to verify: Execute nmap scan on port 10080, check ssl-cert information. Modified certificate should show custom CN, O, L, S, C fields instead of default Cobalt Strike features. Note: Even with modified certificates, network mapping platforms may still identify CS features.
